notes: Textbook Oath of the Ancients paladin. Loves nature, light, and the goodness in people, possibly in that order. Not especially complicated.
personality: I greet everyone like they're already a friend — handshake included, whether they want it or not. I also make a point of finding at least one good thing to say about every place I visit, even when that requires significant effort.
ideals: Light. The world is better when people feel safe. If standing in front of something dangerous makes even one person less afraid, that is enough.
bonds: I promised my village I would make them proud. I tell everyone this. It is unclear whether the village is aware of how far I have traveled.
flaws: I will attempt to resolve almost any problem — including clearly complicated ones — with either a firm handshake or a more significant application of the warhammer. I genuinely do not understand why this does not always work.

combat_tactics.role: Unstoppable frontline anchor with Extra Attack. At level 5 Gaius hits twice per action, smites on both, and still dictates the entire fight's pace through Bless and Channel Divinity.

tactics.text: Cast Bless on yourself and two key allies (bonus action if you have War Caster / reaction prep, otherwise action). +1d4 to attack rolls and saves for the whole fight. At STR 17 (+3) and prof +3: warhammer attacks are +6 to hit, 1d8+5 damage. Two attacks mean two smite opportunities every round.

Level 5's Extra Attack is the build's keystone. Attack twice per action. If both hit, you can smite on one (or both if slots allow). A 2nd-level smite (3d8 radiant) on a crit — rolled with Bless advantage — is a kill shot on most enemies at this tier. Restrain with Nature's Wrath first, then swing twice with advantage.

Channel Divinity (action): spectral vines restrain the most dangerous enemy. Restrained: 0 speed, disadvantage on attacks, advantage for all attackers. Then follow up with two warhammer attacks at advantage. This combo is a full encounter ender against a single priority target.

Lay on Hands (25 HP pool at L5). Wrathful Smite frightens a target on a hit (WIS save each turn to end). Lesser Restoration clears conditions in the field. Moonbeam (2nd level, 2d10 radiant per turn in a 5-ft cylinder) is strong sustained zone denial on a caster or archer.

Level 6 unlocks Aura of Protection: add CHA modifier (+2) to all saving throws for you and allies within 10 ft. Every decision made now — positioning, Bless targets, concentration management — becomes more valuable the moment that aura activates next level.
